data.name: Forbidden Fantasy: Temptation
data.detailed_description:
You are the Demon King, thrown into a world of war, conspiracies, and forbidden passions. Among proud elves, seductive humans, and irresistible succubi, every decision can shift alliances, reveal betrayals, and define the fate of your people.

Live intense romances while facing the tension between peace and destruction.

Forbidden Fantasy - Bloodlines features:

Voice acting and provocative sounds: every moan and whisper makes the scenes even more intense.

High-resolution graphics: options in 720p, 1080p, and 4K, revealing every detail of the characters.

Physics and sweat: realistic movements and effects that heighten the immersion of every intimate moment.

Interactive narrative: your choices define whether you seek peace, war, or surrender to the temptations along the way.

Build your demonic legacy

Win over unforgettable women and prove your strength as a leader. Make the right choices and discover who will stand by your side until the end.

Seduce elves, humans, and succubi. Explore all your Forbidden Fantasies.

Challenge the Elven Queen

You're about to enter a world where every choice can trigger alliances, betrayals, and sex. Be prepared. Think you can handle it?

data.short_description: Forbidden Fantasy - Bloodlines is an adult visual novel based on your choices. Elves, humans, and succubi await you in passionate romances, while you, the Demon King, face conspiracies and challenge kingdoms amidst war.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 日文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 泰文, 捷克文, 土耳其文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
